global_description: Small arachnid with a compact body, typically dark or brown, eight long legs, segmented body with a cephalothorax and abdomen, often hairy or smooth texture, capable of spinning webs.

part_details.cephalothorax: Compact front segment with eyes and mouthparts
part_details.legs: Eight long, jointed, attached to cephalothorax
part_details.spinnerets: Located at rear of abdomen for web spinning

spatial_relations: Cephalothorax at front, abdomen at rear
